title: Rolling Friction Intro
Rolling motion of a ball spinning about a near vertical axis
excerpt: Rolling motion of a ball spinning about a near vertical axis A ball that is projected forward without spin on a horizontal surface will slide for a short distance before it starts rolling. Sliding friction acts to decrease the translation speed, v, and it acts to increase the rotation speed, ω.
